title: BloodHorrorCraft
description: Mod additions: 33 new terrifying mobs, 5 New biomes: The Bloody Plains, The Ash Valley, The Blood Forest, The Smile Cavern, The Hemorrhage Pit And also a dimension: The Bleeding Void All textures were taken on Novaskin or almost
body:
Mod additions: 33 new terrifying mobs, 5 New biomes: The Bloody Plains, The Ash Valley, The Blood Forest, The Smile Cavern, The Hemorrhage Pit And also a dimension: The Bleeding Void

 

All textures were taken on Novaskin or almost 🙃
